text: The official ModelContextProtocol 1.2 C# SDK turns any method into an agent tool with [McpServerToolType] and [McpServerTool]. A working stdio server on .NET 11 in under 50 lines, exposing SQLite to Claude Code. Plus the stderr logging trick that keeps default ILogger from corrupting the JSON-RPC stream.

SkiaSharp 4.0 Preview 1 dropped on April 28. SKPath is now immutable: build paths through SKPathBuilder and call Detach() to get an immutable SKPath that the runtime can safely share, hash, and cache between threads. HarfBuzzSharp gets full OpenType variable-font axis control, and Uno Platform joins as official co-maintainer alongside the .NET team.
